name: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation/NEW
business: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation is North America's largest regional amusement park operator with 26 amusement parks, 15 separately gated water parks, and nine resort properties. It generates revenue from sales of admission, food, merchandise, games, accommodations, and other products. Its primary customers are families and young people ages 12 through 24.

exposures.sentence: Cyber-security risks and the failure to maintain the integrity of internal or customer data could result in damages to the Company's reputation and/or subject it to costs, fines or lawsuits.

Information and artificial intelligence technology systems continue to evolve and, in order to remain competitive, the Company must implement new technologies and systems in a timely and efficient manner.

catalysts.event: Purchase of Six Flags Over Georgia and White Water Atlanta
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, the Company elected to purchase all of the outstanding limited partnership interests in Six Flags Over Georgia and White Water Atlanta, which purchase is expected to be completed in January 2027.
On January 14, 2026, the Company issued $1.0 billion of the 2032 senior notes.

catalysts.event: Election not to purchase Six Flags Over Texas
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company elected not to purchase all of the outstanding limited partnership interests in Six Flags Over Texas.
